Engineering drawing with GD&T for a bearing adapter JordanT June 21st, 2018 Background: - ENGR drawing for an adapter to SKF Super-precision axial-radial cylindrical roller bearings and fixture. - With constraints in flatness and roundness, GD&T used to illustrate parallel planes and concentric of rotation for allowable tolerances. An ideal situation for use: - the bearing would be SKF NRT-280 mounted flat to a workstation. The fixture mounted to the outer bearing rings. Software: - All models and drawings are created using Creo engineering drawing for manufacture, GD&T, ASME Y14.5 Show more...
